summary: Iter16 fully verified end-to-end. Backend: 7/7 iter16 pytest cases pass — contract creation auto-inserts a disbursement Payment (type='disbursement', amount==loan_amount, date==contract_date, RCP-* receipt), paid_amount stays 0, remaining/principal/interest_remaining computed correctly, _recompute skips disbursement, finance.client_payments UNCHANGED after new contract while loans_disbursed +1000 and cash_on_hand -1000, disbursement PDF renders with title 'Loan Disbursement Receipt' + 'Amount Received' and omits 'Principal Remaining', contract PDF Article 4 contains both new bullets ('Kontratu liu loron 1' and 'Tolerasia … 10 dias') alongside the original 'fulan rua' phrase, partial repayment regression still updates paid_amount/remaining_balance. Frontend: /payments shows 3 tabs (Payments 53, Overdue Payment 1, disbursements 2); default 'all' tab excludes disbursements; disbursements-table has blue border (border-blue-200) & blue header (bg-blue-50/60); disbursement badge is blue (bg-blue-100). iter10 fields (days_overdue, penalty, penalty_paid) still returned on POST /contracts.
critical_code_review_comments: Iter14 auction gate changed contract status naming from 'overdue' to 'auction_ready' — 3 stale tests in /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py (TestAuctionFlow::test_overdue_to_auction_sold, TestPublic::test_public_warehouse, TestPublic::test_public_auction_items) fail against the current API. Not iter16-related but should be refreshed in a future cleanup pass.
server.py is >2600 lines — worth splitting into routers (contracts, payments, finance, reports, public) for maintainability.

Disbursement payment is inserted via a separate insert_one after the contract; consider wrapping in a MongoDB transaction so a payment-insert failure doesn't leave a contract without its disbursement receipt.

success_rate.backend: 100% (7/7 iter16, 52/55 overall — 3 pre-existing failures unrelated to iter16)

seed_data_creation: Test contracts, clients, items are all created with TEST_ prefix and cleaned up (DELETE) inside each test fixture teardown.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iter16 fully green. Regression pytest suite: run `pytest /app/backend/tests/test_iter16_disbursement.py -v`. Note the 3 stale failures in backend_test.py (auction status rename + public endpoints) that predate iter16 — flag in next iteration for cleanup.
